subject: [PATCH v3 10/16] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a new category to the pagemap, called PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, which is used for tracking read-write protection (RWP) in userfaultfd. The existing PAGEMAP_SCAN implementation already reports on write-protected pages using the same bit as RWP, but this is not accurate and can lead to confusion. By introducing a new category specific to RWP, the patch ensures that UAPI does not conflate write protection with read-write protection. Additionally, it updates the pagemap_hugetlb_category function to take into account the VMA's registered mode when reporting on PTE bits.
